href="https://thebanktoday.com/net-banking/how-to-activate-net-banking/" target="_blank" data-type="URL" data-id="https://thebanktoday.com/net-banking/how-to-activate-net-banking/" rel="noreferrer To activate it, visit your bank&#8217;s website, register for online banking, and follow the verification process.</p></div><div class="wp-block-uagb-faq-child uagb-faq-child__outer-wrap uagb-faq-item EPF balance online?</strong></span></div><p class="uagb-faq-content">You can check your <a href="https://thebanktoday.com/epf/epfo-balance-check/" target="_blank" data-type="URL" data-id="https://thebanktoday.com/epf/epfo-balance-check/" rel="noreferrer noopener">EPF balance</a> through the EPFO portal or mobile app. Enter your UAN and registered mobile number to access your account details instantly.</p></div><div class="wp-block-uagb-faq-child uagb-faq-child__outer-wrap uagb-faq-item uagb-block-3eba228b" role="tab" tabindex="0"><div class="uagb-faq-questions-button uagb-faq-questions"><span class="uagb-icon uagb-faq-icon-wrap"><svg xmlns="https://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 448 512"><path d="M432 256c0 17.69-14.33 32.01-32 32.01H256v144c0 17.69-14.33 32-31.99h352c17.69 0 32 14.3 32 31.99S417.7 288 400 288z"></path></svg></span><span class="uagb-question"><strong>What documents are required for PAN Card application?</strong></span></div><p class="uagb-faq-content">To apply for a <a href="https://thebanktoday.com/pan-card/what-is-the-use-of-pan-card/" target="_blank" data-type="URL" data-id="https://thebanktoday.com/pan-card/what-is-the-use-of-pan-card/" rel="noreferrer noopener">PAN Card</a>, you need proof of identity, proof of address, and a recent passport-sized photograph. Details are available on the NSDL or UTIITSL websites.</p></div><div class="wp-block-uagb-faq-child uagb-faq-child__outer-wrap uagb-faq-item uagb-block-ff880471" role="tab" tabindex="0"><div class="uagb-faq-questions-button uagb-faq-questions"><span class="uagb-icon uagb-faq-icon-wrap"><svg xmlns="https://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 448 512"><path d="M432 256c0 17.69-14.33 32.01-32 32.01H256v144c0 17.69-14.33 31.99-32 31.99s-32-14.3-32-31.99v-144H48c-17.67 0-32-14.32-32-32.01s14.33-31.99 32-31.99H192v-144c0-17.69 14.33-32.01 32-32.01s32 14.32 32 32.01v144h144C417.7 224 432 238.3 432 256z"></path></svg></span><span class="uagb-icon-active uagb-faq-icon-wrap"><svg xmlns="https://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 448 512"><path d="M400 288h-352c-17.69 0-32-14.32-32-32.01s14.31-31.99 32-31.99h352c17.69 0 32 14.3 32 31.99S417.7 288 400 288z"></path></svg></span><span class="uagb-question"><strong><strong>Which banks offer the best interest rates on savings accounts?</strong></strong></span></div><p class="uagb-faq-content">Interest rates vary among banks. Check our articles on savings accounts to compare rates and choose the one that suits your financial goals.</p></div><div class="wp-block-uagb-faq-child uagb-faq-child__outer-wrap uagb-faq-item uagb-block-88b27cc4" role="tab" tabindex="0"><div class="uagb-faq-questions-button uagb-faq-questions"><span class="uagb-icon uagb-faq-icon-wrap"><svg xmlns="https://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 448 512"><path d="M432 256c0 17.69-14.33 32.01-32 32.01H256v144c0 17.69-14.33 31.99-32 31.99s-32-14.3-32-31.99v-144H48c-17.67 0-32-14.32-32-32.01s14.33-31.99 32-31.99H192v-144c0-17.69 14.33-32.01 32-32.01s32 14.32 32 32.01v144h144C417.7 224 432 238.3 432 256z"></path></svg></span><span class="uagb-icon-active uagb-faq-icon-wrap"><svg xmlns="https://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 448 512"><path d="M400 288h-352c-17.69 0-32-14.32-32-32.01s14.31-31.99 32-31.99h352c17.69 0 32 14.3 32 31.99S417.7 288 400 288z"></path></svg></span><span class="uagb-question"><strong><strong><strong>How can I open a Fixed Deposit (FD) account?</strong></strong></strong></span></div><p class="uagb-faq-content">To open an FD account, visit your bank or use their online platform. Provide neccessary documents, select the tenure and deposit amount, and your FD will be created.</p></div><div class="wp-block-uagb-faq-child uagb-faq-child__outer-wrap uagb-faq-item uagb-block-8609ce69" role="tab" tabindex="0"><div class="uagb-faq-questions-button uagb-faq-questions"><span class="uagb-icon uagb-faq-icon-wrap"><svg xmlns="https://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 448 512"><path d="M432 256c0 17.69-14.33 32.01-32 32.01H256v144c0 17.69-14.33 31.99-32 31.99s-32-14.3-32-31.99v-144H48c-17.67 0-32-14.32-32-32.01s14.33-31.99 32-31.99H192v-144c0-17.69 14.33-32.01 32-32.01s32 14.32 32 32.01v144h144C417.7 224 432 238.3 432 256z"></path></svg></span><span class="uagb-icon-active uagb-faq-icon-wrap"><svg xmlns="https://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 448 512"><path d="M400 288h-352c-17.69 0-32-14.32-32-32.01s14.31-31.99 32-31.99h352c17.69 0 32 14.3 32 31.99S417.7 288 400 288z"></path></svg></span><span class="uagb-question"><strong><strong><strong><strong>What are the benefits of having a credit card?</strong></strong></strong></strong></span></div><p class="uagb-faq-content">Credit cards offer convenience, rewards, and the opportunity to build credit history. You can use them for online shopping, travel bookings, and emergency expenses.</p></div><div class="wp-block-uagb-faq-child uagb-faq-child__outer-wrap uagb-faq-item uagb-block-f985eba7" role="tab" tabindex="0"><div class="uagb-faq-questions-button uagb-faq-questions"><span class="uagb-icon uagb-faq-icon-wrap"><svg xmlns="https://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 448 512"><path d="M432 256c0 can I block my lost ATM card?</strong></strong></strong></strong></strong></span></div><p class="uagb-faq-content">Contact your bank&#8217;s customer care immediately or use their mobile app/website to block your lost ATM card to prevent unauthorized transactions.</p></div><div class="wp-block-uagb-faq-child uagb-faq-child__outer-wrap uagb-faq-item uagb-block-5ec9d4de" role="tab" class="uagb-question"><strong><strong><strong><strong><strong><strong>What is the process of transferring funds through NEFT or RTGS?</strong></strong></strong></strong></strong></strong></span></div><p class="uagb-faq-content">To transfer funds through <a href="https://thebanktoday.com/banking-services/difference-between-neft-and-rtgs/" target="_blank" data-type="URL" data-id="https://thebanktoday.com/banking-services/difference-between-neft-and-rtgs/" rel="noreferrer noopener">NEFT or RTGS</a>, log in to your net banking account, add the beneficiary&#8217;s details, and initiate the transaction with the required information.</p></div><div class="wp-block-uagb-faq-child uagb-faq-child__outer-wrap uagb-faq-item uagb-block-158c398c" role="tab" tabindex="0"><div class="uagb-faq-questions-button uagb-faq-questions"><span class="uagb-icon uagb-faq-icon-wrap"><svg xmlns="https://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 448 512"><path d="M432 256c0 17.69-14.33 32.01-32 32.01H256v144c0 17.69-14.33 31.99-32 31.99s-32-14.3-32-31.99v-144H48c-17.67 0-32-14.32-32-32.01s14.33-31.99 32-31.99H192v-144c0-17.69 14.33-32.01 32-32.01s32 14.32 32 32.01v144h144C417.7 224 432 238.3 432 256z"></path></svg></span><span class="uagb-icon-active uagb-faq-icon-wrap"><svg xmlns="https://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 448 512"><path d="M400 288h-352c-17.69 0-32-14.32-32-32.01s14.31-31.99 32-31.99h352c17.69 0 32 14.3 32 31.99S417.7 288 400 288z"></path></svg></span><span class="uagb-question"><strong><strong><strong><strong><strong><strong><strong>What is the procedure to update personal details in my bank account?</strong></strong></strong></strong></strong></strong></strong></span></div><p class="uagb-faq-content">Visit your bank&#8217;s branch with valid identity proof and updated details. Alternatively, some banks allow online updates through <a href="https://thebanktoday.com/banking-services/how-to-change-mobile-number-online/" target="_blank" data-type="URL" data-id="https://thebanktoday.com/banking-services/how-to-change-mobile-number-online/" rel="noreferrer noopener">net banking</a> or mobile apps.</p></div><div class="wp-block-uagb-faq-child uagb-faq-child__outer-wrap uagb-faq-item uagb-block-ef7fe102" role="tab" tabindex="0"><div class="uagb-faq-questions-button uagb-faq-questions"><span class="uagb-icon uagb-faq-icon-wrap"><svg xmlns="https://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 448 512"><path d="M432 256c0 17.69-14.33 32.01-32 32.01H256v144c0 17.69-14.33 31.99-32 31.99s-32-14.3-32-31.99v-144H48c-17.67 0-32-14.32-32-32.01s14.33-31.99 32-31.99H192v-144c0-17.69 14.33-32.01 32-32.01s32 14.32 32 32.01v144h144C417.7 224 432 238.3 432 256z"></path></svg></span><span class="uagb-icon-active uagb-faq-icon-wrap"><svg xmlns="https://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 448 512"><path d="M400 288h-352c-17.69 0-32-14.32-32-32.01s14.31-31.99 32-31.99h352c17.69 0 32 14.3 32 31.99S417.7 288 400 288z"></path></svg></span><span class="uagb-question"><strong><strong><strong><strong><strong><strong><strong><strong>Can I have multiple savings accounts in different banks?</strong></strong></strong></strong></strong></strong></strong></strong></span></div><p class="uagb-faq-content">Yes, you can have multiple savings accounts in different banks. It provides financial flexibility and allows you to benefit from various banking services.</p></div><div class="wp-block-uagb-faq-child uagb-faq-child__outer-wrap uagb-faq-item uagb-block-9b87b6fc" role="tab" tabindex="0"><div class="uagb-faq-questions-button uagb-faq-questions"><span class="uagb-icon uagb-faq-icon-wrap"><svg xmlns="https://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 448 512"><path d="M432 256c0 17.69-14.33 32.01-32 32.01H256v144c0 17.69-14.33 31.99-32 31.99s-32-14.3-32-31.99v-144H48c-17.67 0-32-14.32-32-32.01s14.33-31.99 32-31.99H192v-144c0-17.69 14.33-32.01 32-32.01s32 14.32 32 32.01v144h144C417.7 224 432 238.3 432 256z"></path></svg></span><span class="uagb-icon-active uagb-faq-icon-wrap"><svg xmlns="https://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 448 512"><path d="M400 288h-352c-17.69 0-32-14.32-32-32.01s14.31-31.99 32-31.99h352c17.69 0 32 14.3 32 31.99S417.7 288 400 288z"></path></svg></span><span class="uagb-question"><strong><strong><strong><strong><strong><strong><strong><strong><strong>How does the RBI&#8217;s monetary policy affect interest rates?</strong></strong></strong></strong></strong></strong></strong></strong></strong></span></div><p class="uagb-faq-content">RBI&#8217;s monetary policy decisions impact lending rates offered by banks. It can influence borrowing costs for loans and the returns on fixed deposits.</p></div><div class="wp-block-uagb-faq-child uagb-faq-child__outer-wrap uagb-faq-item uagb-block-513c832b" role="tab" tabindex="0"><div class="uagb-faq-questions-button uagb-faq-questions"><span class="uagb-icon uagb-faq-icon-wrap"><svg xmlns="https://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 448 512"><path d="M432 256c0 17.69-14.33 32.01-32 32.01H256v144c0 17.69-14.33 31.99-32 31.99s-32-14.3-32-31.99v-144H48c-17.67 0-32-14.32-32-32.01s14.33-31.99 32-31.99H192v-144c0-17.69 14.33-32.01 32-32.01s32 14.32 32 32.01v144h144C417.7 224 432 238.3 432 256z"></path></svg></span><span class="uagb-icon-active uagb-faq-icon-wrap"><svg xmlns="https://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 448 512"><path d="M400 288h-352c-17.69 0-32-14.32-32-32.01s14.31-31.99 32-31.99h352c17.69 0 32 14.3 32 31.99S417.7 288 400 288z"></path></svg></span><span class="uagb-question"><strong><strong><strong><strong><strong><strong><strong><strong><strong><strong>How can I resolve a disputed transaction on my bank statement?</strong></strong></strong></strong></strong></strong></strong></strong></strong></strong></span></div><p class="uagb-faq-content">Contact your bank&#8217;s customer support immediately to report the disputed transaction. They will guide you through the resolution process.</p></div><div class="wp-block-uagb-faq-child uagb-faq-child__outer-wrap uagb-faq-item uagb-block-3f71b2a7" role="tab" tabindex="0"><div class="uagb-faq-questions-button uagb-faq-questions"><span class="uagb-icon uagb-faq-icon-wrap"><svg xmlns="https://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 448 512"><path d="M432 256c0 17.69-14.33 32.01-32 32.01H256v144c0 17.69-14.33 31.99-32 31.99s-32-14.3-32-31.99v-144H48c-17.67 0-32-14.32-32-32.01s14.33-31.99 32-31.99H192v-144c0-17.69 14.33-32.01 32-32.01s32 14.32 32 32.01v144h144C417.7 224 432 238.3 432 256z"></path></svg></span><span class="uagb-icon-active uagb-faq-icon-wrap"><svg xmlns="https://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 448 512"><path d="M400 288h-352c-17.69 0-32-14.32-32-32.01s14.31-31.99 32-31.99h352c17.69 0 32 14.3 32 31.99S417.7 288 400 288z"></path></svg></span><span class="uagb-question"><strong><strong><strong><strong><strong><strong><strong><strong><strong><strong><strong>Is Internet Banking safe? What measures can I take to secure my online transactions?</strong></strong></strong></strong></strong></strong></strong></strong></strong></strong></strong></span></div><p class="uagb-faq-content">Internet banking is generally safe, but you must follow security practices like using strong passwords, avoiding public Wi-Fi for transactions, and enabling two-factor authentication.</p></div><div class="wp-block-uagb-faq-child uagb-faq-child__outer-wrap uagb-faq-item uagb-block-5f49b09b" role="tab" tabindex="0"><div class="uagb-faq-questions-button alerts?</strong></strong></strong></strong></strong></strong></strong></strong></strong></strong></strong></strong></span></div><p class="uagb-faq-content">Visit your bank&#8217;s branch with a
